title: iris ewbankiana var. elisabethae
intro: Iris ewbankiana var. elisabethae, also known as the Elizabeth's iris, is a type of flowering plant in the iris family (Iridaceae). It is a perennial plant native to China, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's rhizome and roots are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, and herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions can be made from its parts. Additionally, the plant has been studied for its potential to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and to exhibit antioxidant properties.
